title: hieracium subramosum subsp. pimelophyllum
intro: Hieracium subramosum subsp. pimelophyllum, also known as the hawkweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Hieracium subramosum subsp. pimelophyllum include its ability to reduce fever, treat skin conditions, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
